name: Trade Flow into Ask Wall (Contra)
hypothesis: Strong buyer-initiated trade flow (high positive trade imbalance z-score) that runs into a densely packed ask book (high ask depth concentration) is likely to be absorbed, leading to a price reversal (down-move). This spec tests if the contra-directional interaction of these two Block C primitives creates a reliable short signal.
mutation_note: Responding to `drop_feature` feedback on an unstable spec. The parent had inconsistent results; this version simplifies the hypothesis by dropping the z-score on ask_concentration and using a simpler, fixed threshold. The direction is explicitly set to `long_if_neg` to test for a price reversal.
